name: NumberInput
searchText: numberinput capture number from user @mantine/core /core/number-input allowdecimal allowleadingzeros allownegative alloweddecimalseparators clampbehavior decimalscale decimalseparator defaultvalue description descriptionprops disabled error errorprops fixeddecimalscale handlersref hidecontrols inputcontainer inputsize inputwrapperorder isallowed label labelprops leftsection leftsectionpointerevents leftsectionprops leftsectionwidth loading loadingposition max min onchange onmaxreached onminreached onvaluechange prefix radius required rightsection rightsectionpointerevents rightsectionprops rightsectionwidth selectallonfocus size startvalue step stepholddelay stepholdinterval suffix thousandseparator thousandsgroupstyle trimleadingzeroesonblur type value valueisnumericstring withasterisk witherrorstyles withkeyboardevents wrapperprops

props.name: allowDecimal
props.description: If set, decimal values are allowed

props.name: allowLeadingZeros
props.description: Determines whether leading zeros are allowed during input. If false, leading zeros are removed as you type (e.g., typing 007 results in 7). Works in conjunction with trimLeadingZeroesOnBlur.

props.name: allowNegative
props.description: Determines whether negative numbers are allowed. If false, the input will not accept negative values, and the decrement button will stop at 0 (when min is not set).

props.name: allowedDecimalSeparators
props.description: Characters which when pressed result in a decimal separator. These characters will be replaced by the decimalSeparator in the input value.

props.name: clampBehavior
props.description: Controls how values are clamped to the min/max range: - 'blur' (default): User can type any value, but it's clamped when the input loses focus - 'strict': User cannot type values outside the range - 'none': No clamping; min/max only apply to increment/decrement controls and arrow keys

props.name: decimalScale
props.description: Limits the number of digits that can be entered after the decimal point

props.name: decimalSeparator
props.description: Character used as a decimal separator. Generally used with allowedDecimalSeparators prop.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled component default value

props.name: description
props.description: Contents of Input.Description component. If not set, description is not displayed.

props.name: descriptionProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Input.Description component

props.name: disabled
props.description: Sets disabled attribute on the input element

props.name: error
props.description: Contents of Input.Error component. If not set, error is not displayed.

props.name: errorProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Input.Error component

props.name: fixedDecimalScale
props.description: If true, automatically pads the decimal part with zeros to match decimalScale (e.g., with decimalScale={2}, typing 5.1 displays as 5.10). Requires decimalScale to be set.

props.name: handlersRef
props.description: Increment/decrement handlers

props.name: hideControls
props.description: If set, the up/down controls are hidden

props.name: inputContainer
props.description: Render function to wrap the input element. Useful for adding tooltips, popovers, or other wrappers around the input.

props.name: inputSize
props.description: HTML size attribute for the input element (number of visible characters)

props.name: inputWrapperOrder
props.description: Controls order and visibility of wrapper elements. Only elements included in this array will be rendered.

props.name: isAllowed
props.description: A function to validate the input value. If this function returns false, the onChange will not be called and the input value will not change.

props.name: label
props.description: Contents of Input.Label component. If not set, label is not displayed.

props.name: labelProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Input.Label component

props.name: leftSection
props.description: Content section displayed on the left side of the input

props.name: leftSectionPointerEvents
props.description: Sets pointer-events styles on the leftSection element. Use 'all' when section contains interactive elements (buttons, links).

props.name: leftSectionProps
props.description: Props passed down to the leftSection element

props.name: leftSectionWidth
props.description: Left section width, used to set width of the section and input padding-left, by default equals to the input height

props.name: loading
props.description: Displays loading indicator in the left or right section

props.name: loadingPosition
props.description: Position of the loading indicator

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum possible value

props.name: min
props.description: Minimum possible value

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called when value changes

props.name: onMaxReached
props.description: Called when the decrement button or arrow down key is pressed and the value has reached the minimum

props.name: onMinReached
props.description: Called when the increment button or arrow up key is pressed and the value has reached the maximum

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called when value changes with react-number-format payload

props.name: prefix
props.description: Prefix added before the input value

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius, numbers are converted to rem

props.name: required
props.description: Adds required attribute to the input and a red asterisk on the right side of label

props.name: rightSection
props.description: Content section displayed on the right side of the input

props.name: rightSectionPointerEvents
props.description: Sets pointer-events styles on the rightSection element. Use 'all' when section contains interactive elements (buttons, links).

props.name: rightSectionProps
props.description: Props passed down to the rightSection element

props.name: rightSectionWidth
props.description: Right section width, used to set width of the section and input padding-right, by default equals to the input height

props.name: selectAllOnFocus
props.description: If set, all text is selected when the input receives focus

props.name: size
props.description: Controls input height, horizontal padding, and font-size

props.name: startValue
props.description: Value used when incrementing/decrementing an empty input. If min is set and startValue < min, min is used instead.

props.name: step
props.description: Number by which value will be incremented/decremented with up/down controls and keyboard arrows

props.name: stepHoldDelay
props.description: Initial delay in milliseconds before stepping the value.

props.name: stepHoldInterval
props.description: Interval in milliseconds between value steps when increment/decrement button is held down. Can be a number or a function (stepCount) => number for dynamic intervals. Requires stepHoldDelay to be set.

props.name: suffix
props.description: Suffix added after the input value

props.name: thousandSeparator
props.description: A character used to separate thousands

props.name: thousandsGroupStyle
props.description: Defines the thousand grouping style. 'thousand' (1,000), 'lakh' (1,00,000), 'wan' (1,0000), 'none'.

props.name: trimLeadingZeroesOnBlur
props.description: If set, leading zeros are removed on blur. For example, 00100 -> 100

props.name: type
props.description: Controls input type attribute

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled component value

props.name: valueIsNumericString
props.description: Advanced: Set to true if you're passing numeric strings (e.g., "12345") and using formatting props like prefix or suffix. In most cases, you don't need this prop. See [react-number-format docs](https://www.npmjs.com/package/react-number-format) for details.

props.name: withAsterisk
props.description: If set, the required asterisk is displayed next to the label. Overrides required prop. Does not add required attribute to the input.

props.name: withErrorStyles
props.description: Determines whether the input should have red border and red text color when the error prop is set

props.name: withKeyboardEvents
props.description: If set, up/down keyboard events increment/decrement value

props.name: wrapperProps
props.description: Props passed down to the root element
